title: The KRAS-Variant and Cetuximab in HPV-Positive Oropharyngeal Cancer: Results from the NRG/RTOG 1016 Trial.
abstract: NRG/RTOG 1016 was a phase III noninferiority trial comparing IMRT + cisplatin versus IMRT + cetuximab for human papillomavirus-positive oropharyngeal squamous cell cancer (HPV+ OPSCC). A germline mutation (the KRAS-variant) previously identified patients with improved outcomes to radiation + cetuximab + cisplatin; thus, we investigated whether there may be similar benefits for IMRT + cetuximab.
